coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 0% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 75% for 7:42. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 75% FTP. This is so easy it's almost boring. Almost.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First block at 100%. This is race pace. If you can't hold this, you can't race. Simple.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First threshold block. 100-100% FTP. Settle in — don't overcook the start.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Starting threshold work. This is the bread and butter of cycling fitness. Embrace it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First block. Sweet spot: called 'sweet' by people who've clearly never done it.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First threshold block. 15:00 at 100-100%. Smooth and steady.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 55% for 10:00. Then 20min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/1. 45-55% FTP, 85-95 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 10:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 42% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last threshold block. 100% FTP. One more step toward crushing your old FTP. Worth it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final threshold block: 15:00 at 100%. Then 5min easy. Hold power steady.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final block! Everything you've built leads to this. 15:00 at 100%. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Last one. Then 5min to contemplate your life choices. 100% FTP.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last threshold interval. 100% FTP, 75-85 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 89% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 30min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 47 minutes of work done. 0 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 47 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 0 minutes total. You've got this.
